column1: # Linux server interface name → NetBox type slug mapping
# Used by the SNMP source via regex_file() in linux-snmp.hcl.
# The pattern is matched against the lower-cased interface name.
# The catch-all at the end returns an empty string so that
# the `or` operator in the HCL falls back to the standard ifType-based slug.
# Catch-all: return empty string so the HCL falls back to the ifType slug
